meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Finish Your SaaS App Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your projects. Use this Antigravity project template and Claude Code workflow to ship your first professional AI app in record time.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' trap stems from scope creep and lack of architectural guardrails. By utilizing an Antigravity project template, you force modular development, while Claude Code automates the boilerplate. This combination narrows your focus to high-impact logic, ensuring you move from a blank repository to a deployed, functional MVP.
content.intro:
You stare at the blinking cursor, a graveyard of half-finished repositories haunting your GitHub profile. The ambition was massive, but the reality of debugging, environment configuration, and architectural paralysis has left you stuck in the 'tutorial purgatory' loop. It is not a lack of talent; it is a lack of a structural launchpad.

Today, we break that cycle. By implementing the Antigravity project template, you transform your development environment into a high-velocity engine. We will pair this with Claude Code to automate the heavy lifting, allowing you to focus on the unique value of your application while the architecture handles itself.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational directory structure that enforces separation of concerns, preventing future technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity modular architecture pattern for a Next.js AI application.

steps.title: Define the Domain Model
steps.description: Explicitly define your state and data schemas before writing logic to ensure type safety across the entire stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive TypeScript schema for an AI-driven task management system using Antigravity best practices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create schema for task management in src/types/"

steps.title: Automate Feature Injection
steps.description: Use Claude Code to inject specific business logic into your scaffolded components without manual wiring.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Inject the authentication middleware into the Antigravity API route structure.

steps.title: Implement the AI Service Layer
steps.description: Abstract your LLM calls into a dedicated service layer so your UI remains decoupled from the AI provider.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an Antigravity-compliant service layer to handle streaming completions from Anthropic's API.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "build service layer for streaming AI completions"

steps.title: Finalize and Deploy
steps.description: Run the final integration checks and prepare the build pipeline for production deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run an audit on the current project against Antigravity production readiness standards.

pro_tips: Never write raw API boilerplate; always use your template's service layer to keep logic portable.
Use Claude Code's 'audit' command every 5 commits to catch architectural drift before it becomes unmanageable.
Limit your MVP scope to exactly three core features; if it doesn't solve the primary user pain, cut it.
Treat your README as a live document; update it via Claude Code after every major feature merge.
Prioritize 'deploy-first' development to ensure your environment configuration is solid from day one.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, document your learning process in a blog post and share it with the community to solidify your authority as a builder.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming about your app and start shipping it. Use the Antigravity template to eliminate the friction that holds back 90% of developers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
